chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ مَنْ عَفَّ عَنْ حَرَمِ النَّاسِ عُفَّ عَنْ حَرَمِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 185 – The one restrains from the sanctity of the people, his sanctity would be restrained from

text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ مَيْمُونٍ الْقَدَّاحِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَا مِنْ عِبَادَةٍ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ عِفَّةِ بَطْنٍ وَ فَرْجٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Muawiya Bin Wahab, form Maymoun Al Qaddah who said,
‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘There is none from the (acts of) worship superior than restraint of the belly and the private parts’.
